allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {config} from 'dotenv'; config\({path:'../../.env'}\); const {default:postgres}=await import\('postgres'\); if\(!process.env.DATABASE_URL\){console.log\('NO DATABASE_URL'\);process.exit\(1\);} const sql=postgres\(process.env.DATABASE_URL,{connect_timeout:8}\); try{const r=await sql\\`select 1 as ok\\`; console.log\('DB OK:', JSON.stringify\(r[0]\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('DB ERROR:', e.code||'', e.message\);}finally{await sql.end\({timeout:2}\);}")
Bash(pnpm --filter @syllary/web add framer-motion gsap @gsap/react three "@react-three/fiber@^8" "@react-three/drei@^9" simplex-noise @fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono)

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {config} from 'dotenv'; config\({path:'../../.env'}\); const keys=['DATABASE_URL','R2_ACCOUNT_ID','R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID','R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY','R2_BUCKET','R2_ENDPOINT','R2_PUBLIC_URL','REPLICATE_API_TOKEN','OPENROUTER_API_KEY','APP_URL','IP_HASH_SALT']; for\(const k of keys\){console.log\(k.padEnd\(22\), process.env[k] && process.env[k].trim\(\) ? 'SET' : 'missing'\);}")

PowerShell($out = Join-Path $env:TEMP "syllary-test.wav"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Speech; $s = New-Object System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer; $s.SetOutputToWaveFile\($out\); $s.Speak\("Streetlights flicker on the avenue. I keep walking till the morning is through. Counting every breath I take. Every word, every beat."\); $s.Dispose\(\); "WROTE: $out"; "SIZE: $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\)")
